title: Aldama knobiana
taxonomy: Aldama knobiana is classified as a species within the flowering plant family Rosaceae, which includes other popular plants such as roses and apples. It is a member of the tribe Pyreae, a group of plants that are often shrub-like in nature. The genus Aldama is part of the subfamily Maloideae, which comprises plants that have a characteristic arrangement of their flowers and fruits. This classification suggests that Aldama knobiana shares some common characteristics with other plants in the same family and tribe. Further study is needed to confirm the exact relationships within the plant's family tree.
